name: Ricotta Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat ricotta until smooth. Gradually add 1 1/2 cups sugar and egg yolks, beating after each addition.
2. Add flour, lemon rind, and vanilla. Mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with 1/2 cup sugar until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the whipped cream and egg whites into the ricotta mixture.
5. Pour batter into a greased and graham cracker-crumb-lined 12-inch springform pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional hour.
8. Turn off the heat and let cool in the oven with the door closed.
9. Store in the refrigerator; this recipe freezes well.
10. Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
